title: RNA Isolation from QIAzol sample with miRNeasy Mini Kit
author: Stephan Schreiber

steps_raw.instruction: Place the tube containing the sample (cell pellets or homogenized tissue in QIAzol reagent) on the bench top at room temperature (15-25 °C) for 00:05:00 .
At this time, centrifuge the MaXtract tube at 14.000 x g, °C, for 00:00:30 .
Pre-cool the centrifuge to 4 °C .
Mix QIAzol-sample by pipetting or choose another appropriate homogenization method.
Transfer by pipetting 1000 µL QIAzol-sample to the MaXtract® tube.
Add 200 µL chloroform.
Securely cap the tube and shake it vigorously for 00:00:15 . DO NOT VORTEX!
Place the tube on the bench top at Room temperature for 00:03:00 .
Centrifuge at 12.000 x g, 4 °C, for 00:15:00 .
In the meantime, label spin columns and 1.5 mL SafeLockTubes for ethanol mixture and elution (if necessary, prepare Buffer RWT and Buffer RPE as indicated in the protocol sheet “miRNeasy Mini”).
Pre-warm the centrifuge to 20 °C .
Transfer the upper, aqueous phase from the Maxtract tube to a new 1.5 mL safe-lock tube (by decanting).
Add 750 µL (around 1.5 volumes) of 100 % (v/v) ethanol and mix thoroughly by pipetting.

Pipet 700 µL sample, including any precipitate, into an RNeasy Mini spin column in a 2 mL collection tube. Close the lid and centrifuge at room temperature at 8.000 x g, °C, for 00:00:30 . Discard the flow-through.
Repeat the last step (A14) using the remainder of the sample.
Add 700 µL Buffer RWT to the spin column. Close the lid and centrifuge for 00:00:30 at 8.000 x g, °C, . Discard the flow-through.
Add 500 µL Buffer RPE to the spin column. Close the lid and centrifuge for 00:00:30 at 8.000 x g, °C, . Discard the flow-through.
Add another 500 µL Buffer RPE to the spin column. Close the lid and centrifuge for 00:02:00 at 8.000 x g, °C, . Discard the flow-through.
Place the spin column into a new 2 ml collection tube and centrifuge at 12.000 x g, °C, for 00:01:00 to dry the membrane further.
Transfer the spin column to a new 1.5 mL SafeLockTube. Pipet 30 µL RNase-free water directly onto the spin column membrane. Close the lid and centrifuge for 00:01:00 at 8.000 x g, °C, to elute.
Remove and discard spin columns from elution tubes.
Put elution tubes with total RNA On ice .
Preheat the ThermoMixer with 0.5 mL block and ThermoTop at 37 °C .
Prepare and label 0.5 mL SafeLockTubes.
Add 3 µL 10x Turbo DNase Buffer to the samples.
Add 1.5 µL Turbo DNase to the samples.
Transfer samples to 0.5 mL SafeLockTubes and mix gently by pipetting.
Incubate samples for 00:30:00 at 37 °C .
Take samples from the ThermoMixer and add another 1.5 µL Turbo DNase. Mix by pipetting.
Incubate the samples for 00:30:00 at 37 °C
During this time, prepare and label 1.5 mL SafeLockTubes for digested total-RNA and thaw DNase Inactivation reagent.
Remove the samples from the ThermoMixer and add 7.2 µL of well-mixed Turbo DNase Inactivation reagent. Mix by pipetting.
Incubate for 00:05:00 at room temperature, mixing occasionally by vortexing at 1800 rpm, °C, .
Centrifuge at 10.000 x g, °C, for 00:01:30 .
Transfer as much RNA as possible (upper, aqueous phase) to 1.5 mL SafeLockTubes by pipetting. Don’t transfer some of the white sediment to the new tube.
Add 140 µL RNase-free water to the sample.
Add 4 µL Glycogen to the samples.
Add 20 µL 3M Sodium Acetate to the samples and mix by pipetting.
Add 600 µL of ice-cold 100% ethanol to each sample and mix by pipetting.
Place samples at -20 °C Overnight .
The next day: Pre-cool the centrifuge to 4 °C .
Centrifuge samples at 12.000 x g, 4 °C, for 00:30:00 .
Carefully remove and discard the supernatant.
Wash the pellet with 500 µL ice-cold 70 % (v/v) ethanol and vortex the solution briefly.
Centrifuge samples at 7.600 x g, 4 °C, for 00:05:00 .
Carefully remove and discard the supernatant.
Wash the pellet with another 500 µL ice-cold 70 % (v/v) ethanol and vortex the solution briefly.
Centrifuge samples at 7.600 x g, 4 °C, for 00:05:00 .
Carefully remove and discard the supernatant.
Centrifuge samples at 7.600 x g, 4 °C, for 00:00:30 .
Carefully remove and discard any rest of the ethanol by pipetting.
Under the PCR workbench, with the tube lid open, allow the pellet to air dry at room temperature (do not overdry the pellet).
At this time, preheat the ThermoMixer with 1.5 mL block and ThermoTop at 58 °C .
Dissolve the pellet in 20 µL of RNase-free water by pipetting up and down.
Incubate samples for 00:08:00 at 58 °C in a ThermoMixer.
Place the samples On ice to cool down. Mix the samples by flicking. Centrifuge briefly to collect the entire sample.
Store total RNA at -80 °C .
Clean all used materials and put them back.
Empty all waste bins and discard collection of flow through.
Clean all used working areas with RNaseAWAY.
Turn off all used instruments.
Turn on the PCR workbench UV light for 30 minutes.
